content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-openai Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 2, 2026, focused on resolving build compatibility issues. The team successfully addressed a critical dependency conflict by removing the broken CommonJS (CJS) build to ensure proper integration with the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Build System Optimization
*   Resolved a critical compatibility issue by dropping the broken CJS build (`dist/cjs/index.node.cjs`). This change prevents runtime errors caused by attempting to synchronously require the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package, which utilizes top-level await. ([#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openai/pull/25))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
